seo.title: Services | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's Private Registry, Success Plan, Premium Search and Private Circle options.

hero.title: Choose the level of support you need.
hero.description: Some families want to submit a profile privately. Others want deeper personal involvement from Gopi Shah. We guide you to the right option after speaking with you.

tiers.label: 01 · Profile submission
tiers.title: Private Registry
tiers.description: Submit a profile free of charge to be considered for selected HeartLink introductions.
features: Private review by the HeartLink team

tiers.label: 02 · Success based
tiers.title: Success Plan
tiers.description: No upfront registration fee. A success fee applies only if HeartLink successfully makes the match.

tiers.label: 03 · Active search
tiers.title: Premium Search
tiers.description: An application-based Premium Search for families where Gopi Shah feels HeartLink can add strong value.
features: Part of the 50 active Premium Search mandate limit

tiers.label: 04 · Highest touch
tiers.title: Private Circle
tiers.description: For select families who need a highly private, wider search with senior-level attention.

protocol.title: Exclusive does not mean complicated.
paragraphs: The Registry Network can grow widely, but Premium Search remains intentionally limited.
HeartLink accepts a maximum of 50 active Premium Search mandates at one time. Acceptance, fees and service level are discussed only after we understand your family and requirements.

closing.quote: Tell us what you are looking for. We will guide you to the right option.
